name: Palma 2 Door Cabinet With Panel Doors Dark Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Hardwood Frame, 2 Adjustable Shelves
description:
Bring stylish storage to your home with the Palma Arched Fluted Cabinet from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Crafted with a hardwood frame, this cabinet boasts a sleek dark brown finish that seamlessly integrates into your existing decor. Its two doors showcase a striking fluted design, complete with easy-pull knobs that reveal two open shelves for organization. The smooth tabletop surface offers additional space for display, while the distinctive arched bottom completes this statement look.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
